creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text:
I already asked approval for deprecation of ports listed bellow, but still got no response from Tim Middleton <x@vex.net>:

http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2011-December/071666.html

So i post request there, and if maintainer will not respond there, i'll deprecate them in two weeks. Here is the ports list in question:

www/zope-FileSystemSite
www/zope-annotations
www/zope-exuserfolder
www/zope-formulator
www/zope-kupu
www/zope-parsedxml
www/zope-proxyindex
www/zope-silva 
www/zope-silvaviews
www/zope-xmlwidgets
www/zope-zsyncer
www/zope-zwiki
